Departure Monitor for Vienna's metro - last updated: 04 Apr 2026

While working on a monitor displaying the Vienna metro system in real time (latest version here), I was asked by a friend of mine, if it would be possible to just track one part of a single line.

Some time has passed and I finally got the free time to work on that. While the code is still in an early stage it is still viewable on GitHub.
